Uses of Package
com.github.copilot

Packages that use com.github.copilot
Package
Description
com.github.copilot
Core classes for the GitHub Copilot SDK for Java.
com.github.copilot.rpc
Configuration classes and data transfer objects for the Copilot SDK.
  • Classes in com.github.copilot used by com.github.copilot
    Class
    Description
    ConnectionState
    Represents the connection state of a CopilotClient.
    CopilotSession
    Represents a single conversation session with the Copilot CLI.
    EventErrorHandler
    A handler for errors thrown by event handlers during event dispatch.
    EventErrorPolicy
    Controls how event dispatch behaves when an event handler throws an exception.
    SdkProtocolVersion
    Provides the SDK protocol version.
    SystemMessageMode
    Specifies how the system message should be applied to a session.
  • Classes in com.github.copilot used by com.github.copilot.rpc
    Class
    Description
    SystemMessageMode
    Specifies how the system message should be applied to a session.
